summary: Updated three template/persona files to support Learning-Engaged Build Mode. Added concepts_exercised field to drop-close deposit schema with explanation in What It Does and checklist. Added Pedagogical Review section to build-close including Concepts Engaged table, Understanding Bank Updates, Application Questions, Next Learning Frontier, and generation steps. Added Step 2b (Learning Landscape generation) to Architect persona with understanding bank cross-referencing workflow and three new self-check items.
notes_for_orchestrator: All edits were targeted additions — no rewrites. Architect persona version bumped to 3.1. The brief header says D4.1 but the deposit filename in the brief instructions says D2.2 — I used D4.1 per my actual drop_id assignment in meta.json.
